span.p:
BreathSessionScreen
вызывает: pause / resume
restartEngine / initState

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
initState()
───
async: getSession() → DTO
кэшируется в _sessionDTO
→ _setupEngine(dto)

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
_setupEngine(dto)
───
dispose() старого StateMachine
создаёт новый StateMachine
эмитит Riverpod state (ready)

div.style: color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(13, 71, 161) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(27, 94, 32) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
stateStream
Stream<StateMachineState>
───
Обогащённые поля:
resetReason / totalPhases
currentPhaseIndex
currentPhaseTotalDuration
currentExerciseShape
nextExerciseShape

div.style: color: rgb(183, 28, 28) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Riverpod State
───
BreathSessionState
loadState / status / phase
remainingTicks / timelineSteps
resetReason / totalPhases
currentPhaseIndex
currentPhaseTotalDuration
currentExerciseShape
nextExerciseShape

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
BreathAnimationCoordinator
Слушает Riverpod state
Читает resetReason из state

span.p:

Слушает Riverpod state
Читает resetReason из state

div.style: color: rgb(74, 20, 140) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LiveSessionCoordinator
Слушает Riverpod state
lifecycle + телеметрия
